hero.title: Professional Cleaning Services
hero.subtitle: We make your space sparkle and shine

about.title: About Us
about.text1: My name is Aleksandra, and I have over
about.text2: years of experience as a professional cleaner. For the past
about.text3: years, I have been running my cleaning services in Stockholm, building a reputation for reliability, quality, and attention to detail.
about.text4: I specialize in high-quality home cleaning services tailored to each client's needs, including regular and deep cleaning. My goal is to create clean, comfortable, and well-maintained living spaces that my clients can truly enjoy.
about.text5: Customer trust and safety are my top priorities. That's why I work in partnership with Trygg-Hansa. This ensures that in the unlikely event of accidental damage during my work, or if keys were to be misplaced, appropriate compensation is fully covered.
about.text6: If you are looking for a trusted and experienced cleaner in Stockholm, I am here to help you keep your home spotless and stress-free.

gallery.title: Our Work
gallery.subtitle: A quick look at the quality and consistency you can expect.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything clients usually ask before booking.
faq.q1: Do you bring your own cleaning supplies?
faq.a1: Yes. We can bring professional products and equipment. If you prefer specific products at home, we are happy to use those instead.
faq.q2: How long does a standard home cleaning take?
faq.a2: It depends on home size and condition. Most regular appointments take between 2 and 4 hours.
faq.a3: Absolutely. We offer one-time, weekly, bi-weekly, and monthly plans depending on your needs.
faq.a4: Yes. We cooperate with Trygg-Hansa, which helps cover accidental damage during service according to policy terms.
faq.a5: If you are eligible in Sweden, we handle the RUT process on the invoice so your tax deduction is applied directly.
